languages.text: "Знатно им тут мозги прополоскало! Того и гляди — выть от злобы начнут".

traits.locale_text: "Знатно им тут мозги прополоскало! Того и гляди — выть от злобы начнут".
traits.speaker: IdiraCompanion

languages.text: "Their brains have been thoroughly scrambled here. They look like they might start howling with rage."
languages.original_text: "Знатно им тут мозги прополоскало! Того и гляди — выть от злобы начнут".

languages.text: «Sus mentes están completamente revueltas. En cualquier momento empezarán a aullar de furia».

languages.text: “这些人的脑子现在被搅得一团混乱。再过片刻，他们怕就要暴怒咆哮起来了。”
languages.original_text: "Their minds have been thoroughly scrambled here. Any moment now, they'll be howling with rage."

traits.locale_text: “这些人的脑子现在被搅得一团混乱。再过片刻，他们怕就要暴怒咆哮起来了。”

languages.text: « Quelque chose a complètement perturbé leurs esprits. Ils risquent de se mettre à hurler de rage d'un instant à l'autre. »
languages.original_text: "Their minds have been thoroughly scrambled here. Any moment now, they'll be howling with rage."

traits.locale_text: « Quelque chose a complètement perturbé leurs esprits. Ils risquent de se mettre à hurler de rage d'un instant à l'autre. »

languages.text: "Zihinleri burada iyice bulanmış. Her an öfkeyle ulumaya başlayabilirler."
languages.original_text: "Their minds have been thoroughly scrambled here. Any moment now, they'll be howling with rage."

languages.text: "Ihr Verstand wurde ordentlich durchgeschüttelt. Gleich werden sie wütend aufheulen."
languages.original_text: "Their minds have been thoroughly scrambled here. Any moment now, they'll be howling with rage."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr Verstand wurde ordentlich durchgeschüttelt. Gleich werden sie wütend aufheulen."

languages.text: 「彼らの頭は完全に混乱している。今にも怒り狂うだろう。」
